tools.name: events_list
tools.description: Returns events on the specified calendar.

params.name: calendarId
params.description: Path parameter calendarId

params.name: timeMin
params.description: Lower bound (exclusive) for an event's end time to filter by. RFC3339 timestamp.

params.name: timeMax
params.description: Upper bound (exclusive) for an event's start time to filter by. RFC3339 timestamp.

params.name: maxResults
params.description: Maximum number of events returned on one result page.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Token specifying which result page to return.

params.name: singleEvents
params.description: Whether to expand recurring events into instances and only return single one-off events and instances of recurring events, but not the underlying recurring events themselves.

params.name: orderBy
params.description: The order of the events returned in the result.

responseMap.reason: Stable identifier if present

tools.name: events_get
tools.description: Returns an event based on its Google Calendar ID.

params.name: calendarId
params.description: Path parameter calendarId

params.name: eventId
params.description: Path parameter eventId

params.name: timeZone
params.description: Time zone used in the response. Optional. The default is the time zone of the calendar.

params.name: maxAttendees
params.description: The maximum number of attendees to include in the response.
